TRD Speak — local push-to-talk dictation for macOS. Recording and transcription run entirely on your Mac; nothing is sent to the cloud.

## Install

1. Download **TRDSpeak.dmg** from the Assets below.
2. Open it and drag **TRD Speak** into **Applications**.
3. Launch **TRD Speak** from Applications.

## Grant the 3 permissions (one step at a time)

On first launch the app stays quiet — just a ⚠️ icon in the menu bar. Click it and follow the steps:

1. **Microphone** — click **Allow** when macOS asks.
2. **Accessibility** — toggle **TRD Speak** on in System Settings (needed to paste the transcription).
3. **Input Monitoring** — toggle on; if System Settings offers **Quit & Reopen**, accept it.

When all three are granted the menu-bar icon becomes 🎤. Hold your dictation hotkey to record, release to transcribe and paste.

## Requirements

- Apple Silicon Mac, macOS 12 or later.
- The app is signed with a Developer ID and notarized by Apple, so it opens with no Gatekeeper warning.
